ruleChain.name: 主路由链 - 根据输入字符串路由到不同处理分支

configuration.jsScript: var cmd = msg.command || ''; if (cmd === 'greet') return ['greet']; else if (cmd === 'calc') return ['calc']; else if (cmd === 'time') return ['time']; else if (cmd === 'sysinfo') return ['sysinfo']; else if (cmd === 'transform') return ['transform']; else return ['unknown'];
var name = msg.name || 'World'; msg.result = 'Hello, ' + name + '! Welcome to RuleGo demo.'; msg.status = 'success'; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};

var a = msg.a || 0; var b = msg.b || 0; var op = msg.op || 'add'; var result = 0; switch(op) { case 'add': result = a + b; break; case 'sub': result = a - b; break; case 'mul': result = a * b; break; case 'div': result = b !== 0 ? a / b : 'Error: division by zero'; break; default: result = 'Unknown op: ' + op; } msg.result = a + ' ' + op + ' ' + b + ' = ' + result; msg.status = 'success'; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};
msg.result = 'Current server time: ' + new Date().toISOString(); msg.status = 'success'; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};
msg.result = 'RuleGo Demo v1.0 | Go Rule Engine | Running on: ' + (metadata.hostname || 'unknown'); msg.status = 'success'; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};

var text = msg.text || ''; var mode = msg.mode || 'upper'; switch(mode) { case 'upper': msg.result = text.toUpperCase(); break; case 'lower': msg.result = text.toLowerCase(); break; case 'reverse': msg.result = text.split('').reverse().join(''); break; case 'length': msg.result = 'Length: ' + text.length; break; default: msg.result = text; } msg.status = 'success'; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};

msg.result = 'Unknown command: ' + (msg.command || '') + '. Available commands: greet, calc, time, sysinfo, transform'; msg.status = 'error'; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};
